description: Cross-section slicer for ThreeJS solid shapes. Renders a ghost copy of the solid with a cutting plane and cross-section polygon.
utility: Create cross-section of a 3D solid shape

arguments.name: solidRef
arguments.description: Reference to solid shape to slice

arguments.name: viewSize
arguments.description: Container size (inherits from solid if omitted)

examples.expression:
S = cube3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
slice_1 = slice3d(at(4,22), S, crossplane(y, 0.5), view(14,14), c(red), fc(lightcoral), fo(0.5))

S = cylinder3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 2, 5)
slice_1 = slice3d(at(4,22), S, crossplane(-1.3, -1.6, 0.9, 0.8))
